title: Convert Mount Paradise School website from Hindi to English

requirements.summary: Convert all Hindi text content to English across all pages including Home, About, Academics, Admissions, Gallery, Contact, and Registration pages
acceptanceCriteria: All page headings are in English
All body text and descriptions are in English
All button labels and CTAs are in English
All form labels and placeholders are in English
All navigation menu items are in English
All toast notifications and success messages are in English

file_operations.description: Convert all Hindi text to English including hero section heading, tagline, feature cards titles and descriptions, and CTA button labels
Translate all content from Hindi to English including page heading, mission statement, vision statement, educational approach description, and core values list
Convert curriculum tab labels (primary, middle, secondary), page heading, subject names, and special activities descriptions from Hindi to English
Translate enrollment process steps, page heading, and contact section from Hindi to English while preserving school contact details
Convert category tab labels and image titles from bilingual Hindi/English format to English only
Translate page heading, contact information labels, and office hours from Hindi to English while keeping actual contact details unchanged
Convert all form field labels, placeholders, section headings, and toast notification messages from Hindi to English
Translate form field labels, placeholders, submit button text, and success toast message from Hindi to English
Replace Hindi navigation menu items with English equivalents in both desktop and mobile menus
Convert quick links, contact information labels, and copyright text from Hindi to English while preserving the school address and contact details

requirements.summary: Update Header navigation menu items from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: All navigation links display English text
Mobile menu also shows English navigation items

file_operations.description: Replace 'मुख्य पृष्ठ' with 'Home', 'हमारे बारे में' with 'About', 'शैक्षिक' with 'Academics', 'प्रवेश' with 'Admissions', 'गैलरी' with 'Gallery', 'संपर्क' with 'Contact', and 'छात्र पंजीकरण' with 'Student Registration' in both desktop navigation and mobile sheet menu

requirements.summary: Convert Home page hero section, feature cards, and CTA buttons to English
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays English content
Feature cards have English titles and descriptions
CTA buttons show English labels

file_operations.description: Translate hero heading, school tagline, quality education description, all feature card titles and descriptions, and button text ('Register Now' and 'Learn More') from Hindi to English

requirements.summary: Translate About page mission, vision, educational approach, and core values sections from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: Mission and vision statements are in English
Educational approach description is in English
All core values are listed in English

file_operations.description: Convert mission section heading and content, vision section heading and content, educational approach section and description, and core values section with all value items from Hindi to English

requirements.summary: Convert Academics page curriculum tabs and subject listings from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: Tab labels are in English
All subject names are in English
Special activities descriptions are in English

file_operations.description: Translate page heading, curriculum tabs ('Primary Education', 'Middle School', 'Secondary Education'), all subject names for each level, and special activities section with activity descriptions from Hindi to English

requirements.summary: Translate Admissions page enrollment process steps and contact information from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: All four enrollment steps are described in English
Contact section displays English text
Process descriptions are clear and professional in English

file_operations.description: Convert page heading, all four enrollment process step titles and descriptions (registration, document submission, interview, confirmation), and contact section heading from Hindi to English while maintaining school contact details

requirements.summary: Convert Gallery page category labels and image titles from bilingual Hindi/English to English only
acceptanceCriteria: All category tabs show English labels
Image titles and descriptions are in English only

file_operations.description: Replace bilingual category tab labels with English-only versions ('All', 'Infrastructure', 'Facilities', 'Activities', 'Events') and convert image titles to English only format, removing Hindi text

requirements.summary: Translate Contact page section headings, office hours, and form instructions from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: Contact information labels are in English
Office hours display in English
Form submission messages appear in English

file_operations.description: Convert page heading, contact information section labels ('Address', 'Phone', 'Email'), office hours label and timing text from Hindi to English while preserving actual contact details and address

requirements.summary: Convert Registration form field labels, placeholders, section headings, and validation messages from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: All form field labels are in English
Placeholders provide English guidance
Success and error toasts show English messages
Form sections have English headings

file_operations.description: Translate all form section headings ('Student Information', 'Parent/Guardian Information', 'Academic Information', 'Address Information'), field labels, input placeholders, select option text, submit button label, and success/error toast messages from Hindi to English

requirements.summary: Update ContactForm component submission success message and field labels from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form labels are in English
Success toast notification displays in English
Submit button shows English text

file_operations.description: Convert all form field labels ('Name', 'Email', 'Phone', 'Subject', 'Message'), placeholders, submit button text ('Send Message'), and success toast notification message from Hindi to English

requirements.summary: Translate Footer quick links, contact information labels, and social media section from Hindi to English
acceptanceCriteria: Footer navigation links are in English
Contact section labels are in English
Copyright and attribution text is in English

file_operations.description: Convert section headings ('Quick Links', 'Contact Us'), navigation link text, contact information labels ('Address', 'Phone', 'Email'), social media section heading ('Follow Us'), and copyright text from Hindi to English while preserving school address and contact details
